rationale: Roll back toward the best-so-far spec (g8) but reduce survival cost to -0.02, reduce velocity penalty to -0.4, and widen terminal tolerances to make landing achievable. The throttle penalty (-0.15 per main engine activation) is kept to prevent degenerate full-throttle behavior. Shaping is increased to 2.0 with slower decay for longer-range guidance. A small descent reward is added to encourage moving downward toward the pad.

components.description: Moderate shaping reward for proximity to pad with slower decay for longer-range guidance.
Reduced velocity penalty to allow controlled descent without punishing all movement.
Penalize large angle and angular velocity to encourage upright orientation.
Throttle penalty (-0.15 per main engine activation), small side engine penalty, and survival cost (-0.02 per step) to prevent hovering and encourage urgency.

components.expression: 500.0 * float(done and obs[6] > 0.5 and obs[7] > 0.5 and abs(obs[0]) < 0.3 and abs(obs[1]) < 0.3 and abs(obs[2]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[3]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[4]) < 0.3) - 200.0 * float(done and not (abs(obs[0]) < 0.3 and abs(obs[1]) < 0.3 and abs(obs[2]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[3]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[4]) < 0.3 and obs[6] > 0.5 and obs[7] > 0.5))
components.description: Large terminal bonus for successful landing with widened tolerances; -200 penalty for crashing or failing to land to align with hidden evaluator.
